proposal.hypothesis: A calibrated latency prior needs only a small learned correction to retain the 60 ms stability basin.
proposal.expectedEffect: Pass all delay-duration and compound-disturbance gates.

gateReasons: reset-d: survival 0.644 below gate without improving the locked baseline
delay-60ms: survival 0.424 below gate without improving the locked baseline
delay-60ms: forward progress 0.000 below gate without improving the locked baseline
delay-60ms: score regression exceeds locked baseline gate
delay-plus-push: lateral drift 0.417 exceeds gate without improving the locked baseline
